name: Youtube Gallery
body:
### About Youtube Gallery

This jQuery plugin displays your Youtube videos as gallery with (or without) Fancybox integration.

You can download the plugin files or clone the repository, like this:
```
$ git clone https://moreirapontocom@github.com/moreirapontocom/youtube-gallery.git
```

### Copyrights
This plugin is totally free to personal and comercial use. Use it the way as you want.
If you improve the plugin, please let me know!

### Authors and Contributors
This plugin was developed by Lucas Moreira (@moreirapontocom).

### Support or Contact
Having trouble with the plugin? Send me an e-mail at <http://lucasmoreira.com.br>.
note: Don't delete this file! It's used internally to help with page regeneration.
